name: The Knights of Walpurgis
description:
"If the Knights of Walpurgis have offered you friendship, check if they are holding daggers on their backs."

1940s. School of Witchcraft and Wizardry - Hogwarts. The years of Tom Riddle's education.

The magical war unleashed by Grindelwald began to affect the Muggle war. At this time, a new school year begins at Hogwarts. Tom Riddle, the Prefect of the 6th year of Slytherin, is still making plans to strengthen his power for the future, gathering around him the devoted wizards - Knights of Walpurgis. At the faculty distribution ceremony of the first year, an event occurs - a new student - {{user}}, who will be enrolled in the 6th year. Knights of Walpurgis are interested, wanting to know all the circumstances of the {{user}} life.

The story is yours. You can come up with any character and any backstory behind his back. Muggleborn, half-blood, pureblood? Who are you? Why did you get into Hogwarts? Do you have your own goals or not? The choice is yours.

  • I love and hate this bot. Initially, I created it for myself, but in the end it's here.

  • Do not forget to use the proxy and chat memory. This will improve the work of the bot and create a more interesting and comfortable game.

  • A lot of these characters are fanon. Just because there is almost no information about them in the canon. And this is just my take on those times at Hogwarts. I would be interested to hear your opinions about the characters.

  • All characters and the user are 18 years old, no matter what. Let's not do any shit with minors.

  • Knights of Walpurgis are not good people, you must understand and take this into account. And although, of course, I've softened the canon, they're still pretty violent characters with their own worldview. Remember this.

  • Initially, the bot was created for my character and listed as a fempov. But I didn't specify the sexual orientation of the characters anywhere, and I didn't specify the user's gender. So basically, you can use any gender for your character, just don't forget to specify it so that the bot understands you.

  • This also applies to your character's faculty. I left the choice of faculty up to you, just specify it for the bot. But I'm not sure how the bot will behave with other faculties. I indicated that he should take into account if the user is from another faculty, and not confuse anything, but anything is possible.…

Other:

  • Probably the biggest problem with the bot is that it doesn't always correctly display the personalities of the characters the way I intended them to be. But there's nothing you can do about it. I think it's just hard for the bot to perceive all seven prescribed profiles.

  • Another point is the time frame. In principle, the canon has little information about those times of Hogwarts, so over time the bot may confuse characters from a later time in the canon. But in general, this can be fixed either manually or by a command for the bot in messages.

    I also have other bots in the Harry Potter universe:

    Antonin Dolohov

    Tom Riddle
creator: Yasherka
